summary: snapshot-brand Step 5 rewritten as 4-movement audience cartography (raw observations → cartography axes → hierarchy mère/sous-audiences → hand-off pédagogique vers mine-voc). New doctrine doc audience-cartography.md. Field-level contract enforced: snapshot-brand fills only the cartography skeleton (meta, identity.gender, identity.age_range, pain.primary_problem). pain_points[], objections[], voice.key_expressions[], psychology.beliefs_*[] are mine-voc territory. Resolves S55 karacare regression where the agent collapsed seven audiences into one flat profile and forced the operator to rebuild the cartography by hand. Includes sync-test-workspace.sh script (R&D side) that excludes brands/ and operator/ from sync to prevent operator state loss.
